mapper.sql: id, college, major_code, major_name, degree_level, study_duration, status, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO academic_major (college, major_code, major_name, degree_level, study_duration, status, remark) VALUES (#{college}, #{majorCode}, #{majorName}, #{degreeLevel}, #{studyDuration}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE academic_major SET college=#{college}, major_code=#{majorCode}, major_name=#{majorName}, degree_level=#{degreeLevel}, study_duration=#{studyDuration}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE academic_major SET status=#{status}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE academic_major SET deleted=1, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM academic_major WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
SELECT FROM academic_major WHERE major_code=#{majorCode} AND deleted=0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM academic_major ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT FROM academic_major WHERE deleted=0 AND status=1 ORDER BY college ASC, major_name ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM academic_student_record WHERE major_id=#{id} AND deleted=0
